title: auricula-ursi pedemontana subsp. iberica
intro: Auricula-ursi pedemontana subsp. iberica, also known as bearberry, is a plant species that belongs to the heather family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic qualities, which can help to treat urinary tract infections and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of bearberry include its ability to relieve symptoms of cystitis, promote a healthy digestive system, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be found in capsule or tablet form, making it a popular herbal remedy for those seeking a natural solution to their health issues.
